narrative.headline: 2018 Mazda CX-5: the engine dominates owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 109 complaints with NHTSA. The engine is overwhelmingly the most reported area at 84%, with the power train a distant second at 14%; together they account for nearly every complaint. No crashes, fires, injuries, or deaths are reported in any category. The remaining areas, engine and engine cooling, electrical system, and forward collision avoidance, each drew only 2 reports.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: By far the largest complaint area: 92 reports (84%). No crashes, fires, or injuries reported, but it is the issue to look at most closely on this model.
